tasks.title: Outline AI Email Subject Line Optimization Mini-Guide
tasks.details: Develop a structured outline for a mini-guide that expands on the AI Email Subject Line Optimizer prompt pack. Include sections on: Introduction, Understanding Subject Line Psychology, Leveraging AI for Subject Lines (with prompt examples), Testing and Iteration, and Advanced Techniques. Focus on actionable steps for small business owners and marketers.
tasks.reason: Building on the AI Email Subject Line Optimizer prompt pack, the next logical step is to create a detailed outline for a more comprehensive product. This moves from a simple prompt pack to a structured guide or mini-course.
